title: iphionopsis rotundifolia
intro: Iphionopsis rotundifolia, also known as the round-leaved iphionopsis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Iphionopsis rotundifolia include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Iphionopsis rotundifolia include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
